description: Divination. In Judaeo-Arabic. Different responses to the client's query are tagged to different numbers. The scribe has a very distinctive hand and downsloping lines. Joins: Alan Elbaum (with the FGP join finder).
description_he: טקסט פרא-ספרותי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
